impact: This advances the PP&D daemon plan by proving the supervisor can append a narrow fixture-first recovery tranche instead of stalling or attempting live DevHub/crawl work when task planning is unavailable.
summary: Adds deterministic supervisor fallback validation for the no-available-task case when Codex planning fails or times out.
target_task: Task checkbox-91: Task checkbox-86: Add supervisor no-available-task fallback validation proving the supervisor can append a deterministic fixture-first tranche if Codex planning fails or times out.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
